trigger: A founding premise or owner clarification changes.
affected_records: Every branch whose premise_row_ids include the changed row, recursively through parent_record_ids.
mandatory_regrade: Recompute status, admissibility, equations, boundary data, and conclusions; negatives become premise-scoped until rerun.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Keep prior frozen records and add a correction layer with old/new premise hashes.
prohibited_response: Silently editing old evidence or retaining its verdict under new premises.

affected_records: All 2+2, projector, phi-slot, twist, screen, and reduced records.
mandatory_regrade: Return to the abstract-coframe parent and rebuild the realization mapping before comparing branches.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Preserve old realization as a conditional historical lane.
prohibited_response: Calling the old slot map false or the new one derived merely because it is preferred.

affected_records: Variation, equation, constraint, boundary, and stability records in that dynamics lane.
mandatory_regrade: Repeat full unrestricted variation and boundary audit before any reduced solve.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Invalidate downstream execution authority while retaining raw artifacts.
prohibited_response: Reusing equations derived after a field was frozen or eliminated.

trigger: An action or admissibility law changes.
affected_records: All P05-P13 records for that law.
mandatory_regrade: Restart at P04/P05 with a new immutable law manifest and independent derivation.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Keep branch identifiers namespaced by law and do not merge outputs.
prohibited_response: Treating nearby coefficients or derivative order as a numerical continuation of the same theory.

trigger: A boundary, topology, or regularity class changes.
affected_records: Every local/global branch using that class, including spectra and conserved charges.
mandatory_regrade: Recompute free-data counts, variational residuals, continuation, and global closure.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Retain the prior class as a separate branch if mathematically admissible.
prohibited_response: Repairing closure with an unregistered wall, cap, cutoff, or parity condition.

trigger: A gauge, chart, frame, field redefinition, or CSN representative becomes singular.
affected_records: Records crossing the singular locus or using the failed reconstruction.
mandatory_regrade: Open an alternate representation branch and compare invariant overlap.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Freeze the failure locus and preserve both chart records.
prohibited_response: Deleting the locus or interpreting coordinate divergence as invariant singularity.

trigger: A reduced solution fails a full omitted-equation residual.
affected_records: The reduced branch and every continuation descendant.
mandatory_regrade: Reclassify as REDUCED_FALSE_PASS and return to P05/P07 reduction derivation.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Preserve raw output as a regression catch.
prohibited_response: Adding a mechanism or retuning tolerance to force acceptance.

trigger: Raw residual, backward error, convergence, or independent method fails.
affected_records: The numerical record and downstream interpretations.
mandatory_regrade: Label UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL or SOLVER_FAILURE_OR_BUG_SUSPECT and rerun only under a new preregistered method audit.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Preserve stdout, stderr, checkpoints, fields, and hashes.
prohibited_response: Reporting a no-go, truncating the branch, or substituting a preconditioned residual.

trigger: A previously omitted sector is released.
affected_records: Every negative or uniqueness claim made in the frozen-sector parent.
mandatory_regrade: Regrade to the exact old slice and explore the new parent space without target seeding.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Maintain parent-child links and unchanged old artifacts.
prohibited_response: Generalizing the old negative to the enlarged space.

trigger: A GR, empirical, carrier, mass, or stability readout suggests a preferred branch.
affected_records: Comparison layer only; the frozen atlas candidate set remains immutable.
mandatory_regrade: Record compatibility/departure without upstream reranking; any new exploration requires a blind preregistration.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Preserve frozen identifiers and comparison disclosure.
prohibited_response: Retuning, deleting, or reseeding upstream branches for a win.

trigger: A solver finds an unregistered singular, disconnected, or type-changing branch.
affected_records: Coverage census and neighboring continuation records.
mandatory_regrade: Add an append-only branch identity and audit whether the original coverage proof was incomplete.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Freeze the discovery and its search path before extending bounds.
prohibited_response: Absorbing it into a smooth branch or hiding it as failure.

trigger: A downstream stage exposes circular bootstrap or missing native object.
affected_records: Global and interpretive descendants of the circular dependency.
mandatory_regrade: Mark closure OPEN, identify the exact missing object, and return only to the earliest logically affected gate.
rollback_or_preservation_action: Preserve all noncircular local results with narrower scope.
prohibited_response: Inventing a scale, density, source, coupling, or selector to close the loop.
